description: an alias-resolved brand lists its deal with the verbatim stage
assertions: the deal resolves via the account alias
stage is the record's stage, quoted verbatim

description: an explicit deal_id returns that deal, bypassing resolution
assertions: exactly the requested deal is returned
latest_stage_event is the last stage_history entry
invoice_status is the denormalized invoice.status, verbatim

description: an unknown deal_id gaps, never fabricates a stage
assertions: a gap names the missing deal id
no stage or date is invented (no-fabrication)

description: an ambiguous brand returns no deals, only resolver candidates
assertions: deals is empty because the brand did not resolve to one account
a gap directs the caller to disambiguate first
